overall.description: A cinematic third-person shot from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a dog walking through a wilderness camp with covered wagons and meat drying racks. The camera follows the animal at ground level through the dirt clearing surrounded by pine trees and rocky outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: wilderness camp perimeter with game drying station

agents.ego_description: low-angle camera following a small dog as it walks past the meat drying racks

notable_agents.action: dog walking steadily forward away from the drying racks

entered.detail: wooden tripod frame with hanging animal carcasses and hides
large prairie schooner wagon with white canvas cover
tripod structure with fish or meat hanging to dry over a metal bucket
dark metal cooking bucket sitting on the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wilderness camp with wooden meat drying racks on the left and a large covered wagon ahead. The camera follows a dog walking at ground level through the dirt clearing, passing by a tripod with hanging game and a metal bucket.

scene_state.functional_zone: central camp area with multiple wagons parked

events.description: moving past the initial drying station into the main open clearing of the camp

agents.ego_description: continuing to track the dog as it moves between the parked wagons toward the center of camp

notable_agents.action: dog walking ahead through the wagon circle toward the background rocks

entered.detail: wagon with large wooden water barrel mounted on the bed
small rustic wooden structure with sloped roof in the background
horse standing near the rocky outcrop in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the open central area of the camp, revealing a second wagon with a water barrel on the right and a small wooden cabin in the distance. The dog continues walking ahead as the initial meat racks fall behind on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: camp interior with scattered firewood and debris

events.description: camera lowers closer to ground level, focusing on the dog and scattered wooden debris

agents.ego_description: camera drops to a very low angle, closely tracking the dog's movement over the scattered branches and logs

notable_agents.action: dog walking over scattered wood debris, tail visible

entered.detail: canvas canopy structure providing shade on the right side of the path
broken wooden branches and firewood littering the dirt ground

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the dog deeper into the camp, lowering to ground level as it navigates over scattered branches and firewood. The barrel wagon and cabin recede into the background while a canvas market stall becomes visible on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ground-level camera movement through a wilderness camp that transitions from a functional food-processing area into the open heart of a rustic settlement. It begins by trailing a dog past wooden meat drying racks and a tripod with hanging game, moving through a dirt clearing toward a large covered wagon. As the dog advances, the scene opens into a central hub where a second wagon with a water barrel appears on the right and a small wooden cabin emerges in the distance. The camera then lowers further toward the earth, navigating over scattered branches and firewood as the initial wagons and cabin recede. Finally, the perspective shifts deeper into the camp, passing a canvas market stall on the right as the animal continues its journey.
